transcript:
CALLER: Good evening. I want to book a follow-up with Dr. Pallavi Nambiar. I was her patient last month.
AGENT: Good evening! Of course. May I have your name and registered number?
CALLER: Shanta Raman. Number is 9800765432.
AGENT: Found your record, Shanta ji. Dr. Nambiar's next available follow-up slot is this Thursday at 2 PM or Saturday at 10 AM.
CALLER: Thursday 2 PM is fine.
AGENT: Confirmed. Shanta Raman, Thursday at 2:00 PM with Dr. Pallavi Nambiar. Anything else?
CALLER: Should I bring my previous reports?
AGENT: Yes, please bring any test reports and prescriptions from your last visit. It'll help Dr. Nambiar review your progress.
CALLER: Will do. Thank you.
